chapters.title: Scoring Methodology

sections.title: 23.3 Beginning a New Habit or Routine

chapters.content_preview: ## Scoring Methodology  Every activity is scored on a 0–100 scale using these factors:  | Factor | Weight | Effect | |--------|--------|--------| | Prescribed Nakshatra (Moon in) | +14 | The day's Moon occupies a star classically prescribed for the activity | | Contraindicated Na
